历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum science rankings were approximately 2516 → 3568 → 3306, with an overall backward shift of about 790 places over the three years. After a significant decline in 2024, there was a slight recovery of about 262 places in 2025, indicating considerable fluctuation. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3306. The provincial science enrollment plan was 9 in 2023, 11 in 2024, and 10 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 13, an increase of 30% compared to 2025, a clear expansion that theoretically lowers the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 82nd on the Soft Science main list, with a stable ranking in the 80–84 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. In 2025, its reputation was relatively positive (Journalism and Communication ranked A++ in discipline evaluation). In 2026, its reputation turned negative (dormitory fire incident), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 11th (high heat), large short video exposure, and high application attention. Journalism and Communication is A+ (top nationally), directly related to the university's enrollment majors such as Communication (Intelligent and Computational Communication direction). Among science majors, Digital Media Technology and Communication Engineering belong to the electronic information category, with strong disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with majors like Digital Media Technology and Communication Engineering having high social popularity. In 2026, the number of science examinees in the province is approximately 163,000 (a significant increase from 52,500 in 2025), leading to intensified competition. The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Xinjiang examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is about 1.5% (9 out of 598 nationally in 2025), a very small proportion, making it a cross-provincial enrollment that is greatly affected by changes in the province's examinee population.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline of 3306, the 30% enrollment expansion in 2026 (pushing the ranking number higher), and the significant increase in Xinjiang science examinees (intensified competition pushing the ranking number higher), the expansion effect and intensified competition largely offset each other. The negative reputation and high Douyin attention form a limited downward correction. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3871, with a range of 3371–4371.

- Communication (Intelligent and Computational Communication Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Communication Engineering
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Business Administration (Intelligent Business Management Direction)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 3371–4371, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 (Intelligent Audiovisual Engineering, Communication Engineering) as the main direction, Tier 1 (Digital Media Technology, Communication) as a sprint, and Tier 3 (Cyberspace Security, Business Administration) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3371), you can focus on sprinting for the top-tier majors in Tier 1.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; approximately 82nd in the Soft Science main ranking, stable in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationwide; 2025 reputation relatively positive (Journalism and Communication A++ discipline ranking); 2026 reputation relatively negative (dormitory fire incident), Douyin popularity ranking 11th (high heat), large short video exposure, high application attention; Journalism and Communication A+ (top nationwide), directly related to the university's liberal arts enrollment majors such as Journalism (Journalism and Public Opinion Direction), Advertising (Brand Direction), Communication, etc., strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Journalism and Communication category 2023–2026 overall significantly discouraged (Zhang Xuefeng effect, employment pressure), but Communication University of China as a top industry institution is less affected; provincial 2026 liberal arts candidate count approximately 75,000 (a significant increase from 24,000 in 2025), competition notably intensified; the university is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Xinjiang candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is very small, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, significantly affected by changes in the scale of provincial candidates.

预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline of 802 places, the 50% enrollment expansion in 2026 (pushing the ranking number higher) and the significant increase in Xinjiang liberal arts candidates (competition intensification pushing the ranking number higher), the expansion effect and competition intensification largely offset each other; the A+ Journalism and Communication discipline attraction provides limited support.
